name: Presurance Holdings, Inc.
business: Presurance Holdings, Inc. is an insurance holding company that offers homeowners insurance products, primarily low-value dwelling insurance, in Texas, Illinois, and Indiana. As of December 31, 2025, the company no longer writes any commercial lines business and focuses solely on personal lines. All homeowners business is produced through a single managing general agency, SSU.

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we offer only homeowners insurance products in Texas, Illinois and Indiana.

The Company is subject to significant concentration of risk because all of the homeowners business is produced by one agency, SSU, and we no longer have any ownership interest or control over where SSU places its business.

catalysts.event: Rights offering of $14.0 million common stock completed
catalysts.sentence: On February 27, 2026, the Company issued $14.0 million of common stock through a backstopped rights offering for 14,000,000 shares of common stock priced at $1.00 per share.

catalysts.event: Redemption of Series B Preferred Stock
catalysts.sentence: The Company redeemed all of the $7.5 million of Series B Preferred Stock in February 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected receipt of third contingent payment from CIS Sale
catalysts.sentence: The third contingent payment, equaling $10.0 million, is expected to be earned and paid by September 2026, but is still subject to uncertainty.

catalysts.event: Board authority to effect reverse stock split expires
catalysts.sentence: Our board of directors has authority to select an exchange ratio within the approved range at any time prior to June 3, 2026.

catalysts.event: Deadline to regain Nasdaq minimum bid price compliance
catalysts.sentence: In accordance with Nasdaq Marketplace Rule 5810(c)(3)(A), the Company has a period of 180 calendar days from March 3, 2026, or until August 31, 2026, to regain compliance with the Minimum Bid Price Requirement.
